name: dada-quest
description: DaDaQuest - crafted 3D diorama platformer with deterministic smoke and screenshot modes

scripts.build: npm run check:asset-manifest && vite build && npm run check:dist-nozip
scripts.check:dist-nozip: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='dist';const bad=[];const walk=(d)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(d))return;for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const f=d+'/'+e.name;if(e.isDirectory())walk(f);else if(/\.zip$/i.test(e.name))bad.push(f)}};walk(p);if(bad.length){console.error('Zip artifacts found in dist:');for(const f of bad)console.error(' - '+f);process.exit(1)}console.log('No zip artifacts in dist.');"
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:smoke
scripts.screenshot: npm run build && npm run preview -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173 & sleep 3 && playwright test --config playwright.screenshot.config.js; kill %1
scripts.shots: npm run build && playwright test --config playwright.screenshot.config.js
